note: Proxy: sum of year-end TNA (shares*NAV) of curated ETF list tracking the index. NAV comes from fund_etf_fund_info_em with fund_etf_hist_em close-price fallback when the NAV endpoint returns empty on transient failure. Not direct passive AUM disclosure; ETF universe expands over time so older snapshots understate true passive-tracking AUM. See docs/limitations.md §3.
